title: lolium temulentum subvar. robustum
intro: Lolium temulentum subvar. robustum, also known as robust false oats or robust darnel, is a subvariety of Lolium temulentum, a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's medicinal properties also contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and swelling, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems like bronchitis and asthma. Robust false oats can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
